steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The colon after the blank signals an explanation: "Lecuona showcased a diverse range of musical talents in different areas, from orchestral pieces and operas to popular film scores." The blank must mean diverse or wide-ranging.

steps.title: Substitute each choice
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean having many different types or kinds. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — outdated: "how outdated his body of work is" — outdated means no longer current. The passage praises his work and offers no such criticism. ✗
  • Choice B — lonely: "how lonely his body of work is" — lonely means solitary or isolated. This describes an emotional state with no basis in the passage. ✗
  • Choice C — forgotten: "how forgotten his body of work is" — forgotten means no longer remembered. The passage highlights the impressiveness of his work, not its obscurity. ✗
  • Choice D — varied: "how varied his body of work is" — varied means having many different types, directly matching the diverse range of musical styles listed after the colon. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
